descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average diameter of crystalline grains in the microstructure
descriptors.rationale: Fundamental length scale controlling Hall-Petch strengthening and boundary effects

quality.loss_reason: Averaging loses full size distribution and spatial arrangement information
quality.notes: Single value collapses distribution; measurement method affects result

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: Angular difference in crystal orientation across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: Determines boundary energy, mobility, and distinction between low/high angle boundaries

representation.encoding: misorientation distribution function discretized into angle bins

quality.loss_reason: Binning discretizes continuous distribution; loses spatial boundary network topology
quality.notes: Good statistical representation but loses individual boundary identities

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: Degree of preferred crystallographic orientation in polycrystalline aggregate
descriptors.rationale: Controls anisotropic mechanical and physical properties of polycrystal

representation.encoding: texture index or J-factor from ODF

quality.loss_reason: Single index collapses full orientation distribution function into one number
quality.notes: Different texture types can yield same index; loses directional information

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total length of dislocations per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Primary indicator of stored plastic deformation and work hardening state

quality.loss_reason: Loses dislocation character, spatial distribution, and network arrangement details
quality.notes: Measurement method dependent; geometrically necessary versus statistically stored distinction lost

descriptors.name: precipitate volume fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Volume percentage of second-phase particles in matrix
descriptors.rationale: Controls precipitation strengthening and influences recrystallization kinetics

representation.notes: Often paired with precipitate size distribution

quality.loss_reason: Loses precipitate size, shape, spatial distribution, and coherency state
quality.notes: Same fraction can result from very different precipitate populations

descriptors.name: stacking fault energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: Energy per unit area of stacking fault defects
descriptors.rationale: Material property controlling dislocation dissociation width and deformation mechanisms

representation.notes: Intrinsic material property, composition and temperature dependent

quality.notes: Well-defined intrinsic property for given composition and temperature

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Directly related to grain size, governs diffusion pathways

representation.encoding: real-valued positive number, inversely proportional to grain size

quality.loss_reason: Redundant with grain size for equiaxed grains; loses topology information
quality.notes: Dependent descriptor; different morphologies yield different density for same size

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: Ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies grain shape and morphological anisotropy from processing

representation.encoding: real number greater than or equal to 1

quality.loss_reason: Averaging loses per-grain variation and grain shape distribution details
quality.notes: Loses orientation of elongation and full shape descriptors

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Volume fraction of recrystallized grains versus deformed grains
descriptors.rationale: Tracks microstructural evolution during annealing and recovery processes

representation.notes: Time-dependent state variable during thermal processing

quality.loss_reason: Loses spatial distribution, nucleation sites, and growth kinetics information
quality.notes: Classification threshold between recrystallized and deformed introduces measurement ambiguity

descriptors.name: twin boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total length of twin boundaries per unit area
descriptors.rationale: Special low-energy boundaries affecting mechanical properties and deformation twinning

representation.notes: Subset of total boundary population, material specific

quality.loss_reason: Loses twin variant distribution, thickness, and spatial arrangement details
quality.notes: Well-defined twin criterion but loses microstructural context

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average size of dislocation cell structures within grains
descriptors.rationale: Secondary length scale from dislocation arrangement, indicates deformation substructure

representation.notes: Typically smaller than grain size, forms during deformation

quality.loss_reason: Averaging loses substructure distribution, misorientation gradients, and spatial heterogeneity
quality.notes: Definition ambiguous; depends on misorientation threshold for subgrain identification
